feature/issue-60-delegate-quorum-slot-co.task_description: Delegate quorum slot coding to external agents via quorum-slot-dispatch.cjs
feature/issue-60-delegate-quorum-slot-co.approach: Build quorum-slot-dispatch.cjs to delegate coding work to external agent CLIs via a standardized contract, creating the foundational routing adapter and CLI integration layer.
out_of_scope: Q-learning loop implementation and performance-based routing optimization
Agent registry with persistent storage and configuration management
Learning loop training data collection and feedback mechanisms
Multi-agent comparison benchmarks and telemetry aggregation
Interactive demo application and UI for agent selection
feature/issue-60-delegate-quorum-slot-co.risk_reason: Extending quorum slot dispatch with external agent CLI invocation is a multi-file architectural change affecting core dispatch infrastructure with tight coupling to requirements, rate-limiting, and prompt construction systems
